todos.title: Main Admin Panel Structure
todos.description: Create main admin page with tabbed interface structure using Vuexy VTabs component. Set up basic navigation and placeholder tab components.
todos.planningDocSection: Phase 4: Vuexy Admin Panel Integration - Session 4.1

todos.title: Create AdminPanel.vue Component
todos.description: Create main AdminPanel.vue component with VTabs for Profiles and Types tabs. Use Vuexy VTabs, VTab, VWindow, and VWindowItem components.

todos.title: Create Placeholder ProfilesTab Component
todos.description: Create ProfilesTab.vue placeholder component in tabs directory. Add basic component structure with placeholder content.

todos.title: Create Placeholder TypesTab Component
todos.description: Create TypesTab.vue placeholder component in tabs directory. Add basic component structure with placeholder content.

todos.title: Update Router Configuration
todos.description: Update router to use single /admin route pointing to AdminPanel.vue. Remove separate entity routes. Update home redirect to /admin.

todos.title: Verify Tab Navigation
todos.description: Test tab navigation works correctly. Verify tabs render, clicking switches content, Vuexy styling applies, no console errors.
